news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a positive movement in the stock market following remarks made by President Donald Trump, resulting in a surge in auto stocks. Palantir's stock value also saw an increase, whereas Nvidia observed a decline. The market reacted to statements from Federal Reserve's Waller concerning potential rate cuts. Trump expressed intentions to support the automotive industry, although Tesla did not perform as well as its counterparts during this period.
news.headline: Dow Jones up, auto stocks rise, Palantir up, Nvidia falls; Trump mentions auto help, Tesla lags.

news.summary: Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE: GS) posted a 10% increase in revenue for its first-quarter global banking and markets division, reaching $10.71 billion. The surge was primarily attributed to strong equity trading revenue. CEO David Solomon expressed caution during the earnings call, mentioning the possibility of uncertainty and turbulence on the horizon. Solomon highlighted the growing likelihood of a recession as global signs point towards an economic slowdown. He also emphasized concerns regarding potential impacts from escalating trade tensions. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs CEO warns of tariff fears impacting US and global economies, as first-quarter revenue rises 10% to $10.71 billion.

news.summary: The latest installment in the acclaimed film series focuses on the courageous individuals in the healthcare sector. Produced in collaboration with Medscape and renowned filmmaker Jeffrey Teitler of Envision Films, the seventh film was released by Hartford HealthCare. This project aims to shed light on the unsung heroes of the healthcare industry. The film was released on April 14, 2025, in Hartford, Connecticut.
news.headline: Hartford HealthCare, Medscape, and Envision Films release mini-doc giving a glimpse inside the ICU. 7th film of series. HARTFORD, Conn., April 14, 2025.

news.summary: Beazer Homes, a company listed on the NYSE under BZH, will be releasing its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025 on May 1, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call discussing the results is scheduled for the same day at 5:00 PM ET. Those interested can access the call and view the presentation slides on Beazer Homes' website. The public is invited to tune in for this important event focusing on the company's performance.
news.headline: Beazer Homes to webcast fiscal Q2 results conference call on May 1, 2025 at 5:00 PM ET. Public can join online.

news.summary: As per the latest data, the annual inflation rate rose to 5.4% in July, marking a substantial increase from the previous month. Economists were predicting a more modest increase to 4.9%, making this jump unexpected and significant. The core inflation rate, which excludes volatile items such as food and energy, also saw a notable increase to 4.3%. This surge in inflation is putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to consider tightening its monetary policy to curb rising prices. Additionally, the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increased by 0.5% in July, exceeding expectations and contributing to concerns about the continued inflationary pressures in the economy. These latest figures indicate a challenging economic environment that policymakers will need to navigate in the coming months.
news.headline: Singer Katy Perry and journalist Gayle King join historic Blue Origin flight.
Kraken's expansion beyond crypto goes global with accelerating profits and market cap growth.

news.summary: Onsemi (NASDAQ: ON) from Scottsdale, Arizona, has decided to end its plans to acquire Allegro MicroSystems, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALGM) and has retracted its all-cash bid to purchase Allegro at $35.10 per share. Although onsemi still sees the potential benefits of merging these entities, providing value to Allegro shareholders and enhancing services for their customers, the acquisition has been terminated.
news.headline: onsemi withdraws $35.10 per share acquisition proposal for Allegro MicroSystems, Inc.

news.summary: Analyst Arun Jayaram from JP Morgan is predicting a strong first-quarter performance for APA Corporation (NASDAQ: APA). Jayaram anticipates that the company's overall volumes will align with their guidance, with financial results slightly exceeding Street projections. The forecast includes an estimated adjusted oil production of 398 thousand barrels of oil equivalent per day (MBoe/d), and U.S. oil output is expected to be around the lower range of the 125–127 MBoe/d guidance. The total volumes may be slightly impacted by approximately 11 million cubic feet equivalent per day (mmcfe/d) of gas/NGL shut-ins in March, with the majority being... (remaining content available on Benzinga.com).
news.headline: JP Morgan analyst predicts APA Corp's strong Q1 with oil output at 398 MBoe/d, but expects slight impact from March shut-ins.

news.summary: Join Nabors Industries Ltd. (NYSE: NBR) for a virtual event on April 30, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Central Time, featuring Anthony G. Petrello, Chairman, President, and CEO, and William Restrepo, CFO. The event will offer insights into the company's strategies and financial performance.
news.headline: Nabors Industries Ltd. (NYSE: NBR) invites for 1st Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call on April 30, 2025 at 11:00 a.m. Central Time.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 14, 2025, Capital Southwest Corporation ("Capital Southwest") (Nasdaq: CSWC), an internally managed business development company specializing in offering adaptable financing solutions for middle market businesses' acquisition and growth, shared its initial operating outcomes for the fourth quarter of the 2025 fiscal year, ending on March 31, 2025. Additionally, they disclosed details on their fourth quarter 2025 earnings release and conference call schedule.
news.headline: Capital Southwest announces its preliminary Q4 2025 results with earnings release and conference call for March 31, 2025.

news.summary: Kris Carey will be resigning from her position as EVP and Chief Human Resources Officer, and will be leaving the company in May 2025.
news.headline: Constellation Brands appoints Paula Erickson as new Chief Human Resources Officer, as Kris Carey steps down by May 2025.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025 in New York, Denali Capital Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: DECA) announced that its shareholders approved changes to the company's memorandum and articles of association. The amendments extend the deadline for the initial business combination from April 11, 2025 to December 11, 2025. The company has the option to further extend this deadline up to eight times, with each extension lasting an extra month.
news.headline: Denali Capital Acquisition Corp extends business combination deadline to Dec 11, 2025 after shareholder approval. Up to 8 one-month extensions allowed.
Tariffs on chips and drugs initiated by Trump.

news.summary: In a recent report from Panama City on April 14, 2025, Copa Holdings, S.A. (NYSE: CPA) shared preliminary data on passenger traffic for March 2025.
news.headline: Copa Holdings reports March 2025 traffic stats.

news.summary: A recent report states that the Global Education Index (GEI) increased by 3.5% this year, reaching a record high of 78.9. The report highlights that the Asia-Pacific region experienced the most significant growth in education quality, with an increase of 5.2%. Additionally, gender parity in education has improved globally, with nearly 95% of countries achieving gender equality in primary education. However, challenges remain as 258 million children are still out of school, and only 49% of countries have achieved gender parity in upper secondary education. The report underscores the importance of continued efforts to ensure quality education for all.
news.headline: Investment firm DGL Investments No. 1 Inc. proposes deal with Rep Group Ltd. and Perspectives Productions Ltd.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2024, revenues saw a significant 56% increase, reaching $8.0 million, showcasing robust market demand. Income before income taxes also experienced a substantial growth, more than tripling to $0.7 million, marking a notable 257% rise from the first quarter of 2024. The cash position remained robust, standing at $7.6 million as of March 31, 2025. The company, based in STUART, Fla., announced these positive financial outcomes on April 14.
news.headline: Health In Tech's Q1 2025 results show 56% revenue increase to $8.0 million, 257% income surge to $0.7 million, with $7.6 million in cash holdings.

news.summary: SNDL Inc. (Nasdaq: SNDL) (CSE: SNDL) based in Edmonton, AB, disclosed plans to unveil its financial results for Q1 2025, up to March 31, 2025, before the market opens on May 1, 2025. This announcement comes as SNDL gears up to share its financial performance insights with investors and analysts. Stay tuned for the detailed figures and insights from SNDL's operations in the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: SNDL (Nasdaq: SNDL) will disclose Q1 2025 financials on May 1st, 2025 for the period ending March 31st, 2025.

news.summary: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) has scheduled its Annual Meeting of Shareholders for May 7, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (EDT) in a virtual-only format. The meeting will take place online due to current circumstances. Shareholders are encouraged to refer to the Company's Proxy Statement and the most recent Annual Report for further information leading up to the meeting.
news.headline: S&P Global's 2025 Annual Shareholders Meeting on May 7 at 8:00 a.m. (EDT) will be virtual-only. (NYSE: SPGI)

news.summary: Evolution has finalized the acquisition of non-operated oil and gas assets in New Mexico, Texas, and Louisiana for an investment of $9 million. This move is aimed at improving cash flow predictability and ensuring the sustainability of dividends for the company.
news.headline: Evolution Petroleum completes $9MM acquisition of assets in NM, TX, & LA, boosting cash flow & dividend sustainability.

news.summary: In Frederick, Md., on April 14, 2025, TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. revealed its fourth quarter and year-end financial results for 2024. TOMI is a renowned global company listed on NASDAQ as TOMZ. Specializing in disinfection and decontamination, TOMI utilizes the Binary Ionization Technology (BIT) platform under its SteraMist brand.
news.headline: TOMI Environmental Solutions reported its Q4 and 2024 financial results. Specializes in disinfection with BIT.

news.summary: The re-audit of the 2022/2023 financial statements has been finalized, highlighting the company's commitment to accuracy and transparency in its financial reporting. With this process now complete, the focus is shifting towards driving growth and implementing operational strategies to enhance performance. Key figures from the financial statements will guide decision-making moving forward, providing valuable insights to support the company's objectives.
news.headline: Stran & Co. completed a re-audit of 2023/2022 financials, now focusing on growth.

news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on April 14, 2025, ARB IOT Group Limited (NASDAQ: ARBB) disclosed that its subsidiary, ARB R1 Technology Sdn Bhd, secured a contract worth around USD53.0 million. The deal involves providing advanced AI data center server solutions to Whizzl Group, signifying a significant advancement in AI infrastructure within the Malaysian industry.
news.headline: ARB IOT Group secures $53.0M order to supply AI servers in Malaysia, enhancing AI infrastructure capabilities.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Dyne Therapeutics, Inc. based in Waltham, Massachusetts, disclosed that it had provided inducement equity awards to three recently hired staff members. These awards, approved by Dyne’s Compensation Committee, were crucial in securing these employees' commitment to joining the company and comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Dyne is a clinical-stage organization concentrating on advancing revolutionary therapeutics for individuals grappling with genetically motivated neuromuscular illnesses. The company trades on Nasdaq under the symbol DYN.
news.headline: Dyne Therapeutics grants equity awards to 3 new employees, complying with Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4).

news.summary: In New York City, on April 14, 2025, a special purpose acquisition company called byNordic Acquisition Corporation ("BYNO") disclosed that they have deposited $40,312 into their trust account to prolong the timeline for completing a business merger. This extension grants an additional month, now running until May 12, 2025. This extension is the ninth out of a potential twelve one-month extensions sanctioned by an amendment made on August 8, 2024 to BYNO's Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation. This modification enables BYNO's board of directors, at their full discretion and without requiring another stockholder vote, to opt for monthly extensions until August 12, 2025, or until the completion of BYNO's initial business consolidation.
news.headline: byNordic Acquisition Corp. extends business combination deadline by 1 month after depositing $40,312 into trust account.

news.summary: In Atlanta on April 14, 2025, media company Gray Media disclosed the appointment of Mark Little as the new General Manager of KWQC, an NBC affiliate located in Davenport, Iowa for the Quad Cities region. Little, who has been serving as the News Director of WMC-TV in Memphis, Tennessee for the past three years, will assume his new role on May 1, 2025.
news.headline: Mark Little promoted to GM of KWQC in Davenport, IA, effective May 1, 2025, previously served as News Director in Memphis.

news.summary: Today, Dorman Products, Inc. (NASDAQ: DORM) disclosed plans to release its financial results for the first quarter ending March 29, 2025, after the Nasdaq Stock Market closes on May 5, 2025.
news.headline: Dorman Products to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 5, 2025 post Nasdaq closing.

news.summary: An acquisition worth US$2.2 billion, equivalent to approximately CAD$3.01 billion, is anticipated to have an instant positive impact on adjusted funds from operations per share.
news.headline: Capital Power buys two assets in PJM for $2.2 billion (CAD$3.0 billion), expects immediate benefit in funds per share.

news.summary: In Dallas, an innovative company called nMetric has just launched a groundbreaking AI Genetic Algorithm Scheduling platform designed for complex manufacturing and multi-project environments. This platform, which utilizes patented technology, aims to address long-standing challenges that have persisted in these industries for decades. With the potential to revolutionize the way scheduling is done, nMetric's AI platform is set to make a significant impact.
news.headline: nMetric unveils AI Genetic Algorithm Scheduling platform for manufacturing, solves long-standing issues.

news.summary: Analysts Andrew Obin and Sabrina Abrams from B of A Securities shared their predictions for industrial stocks leading up to first-quarter earnings. They anticipate that the earnings will either surpass or meet expectations, with potential support from strong performances in the second quarter by industrial distributors like Fastenal Company (NASDAQ: FAST) and MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI). One highlighted concern is the possibility of investors not encountering any negative news, surprises, or downward revisions until the second quarter earnings season. The analysts expect companies to either sustain or reduce their guidance for 2025. They also foresee crucial decisions about capital expenditure and operating expenses being made in the middle to end of the second quarter, setting up the third quarter as a potential low point for earnings. Additionally, they predict a rise in U.S. investment, particularly in sectors with minimal labor requirements and well-established supply chain networks that have potential for efficient expansion.
news.headline: BofA analysts expect Q1 earnings for industrials to meet or beat estimates, highlighting 3M, JCI, GE Vernova as top picks.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the number of new COVID-19 cases has significantly decreased by 40% compared to last month, with a total of 10,000 new cases reported this week. The death toll has also dropped by 25%, with 200 new fatalities recorded. Hospitalizations have decreased by 30%, with only 500 patients currently admitted. These developments indicate a positive trend in the fight against the pandemic. Additionally, vaccination rates continue to rise, with 70% of the population now fully vaccinated. The government is urging people to remain vigilant and follow safety protocols to prevent any resurgence of the virus.
news.headline: Brazil plans to offer oil blocks where Petrobras is seeking to drill, despite challenges. #Oil #Petrobras #Brazil

news.summary: Tribe Property Technologies Inc. announced record-breaking financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, Tribe achieved revenue of $8.43 million, a 64.9% increase from the same period in 2023. For fiscal 2024, revenue was $28.26 million, representing a 46% increase from fiscal 2023. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4-2024 was $727 thousand, marking a significant improvement over the previous year. The company's gross profit for fiscal 2024 was $10.73 million, with over 85% of revenue sourced from software and services contracts. Tribe also completed a non-brokered private placement in Q1 2025, raising $1,087,882 to strengthen its financial position. The company remains committed to achieving profitability through strategic steps, and aims to grow through increased monthly recurring revenue, strategic acquisitions, and improving profitability in the future. Management is optimistic about 2025 and looks to enhance growth through technology solutions and acquisitions.
news.headline: Tribe Property Technologies posts record $8.4M revenue, turns positive in Adjusted EBITDA for Q4-2024, targets growth in 2025.

news.summary: A recent report by EF Education First (EF) reveals a global decrease in English proficiency over the past four years. EF, a leading provider of cultural education programs, conducts the EF English Proficiency Index (EF EPI) annually since 2011. The study, which is the largest international survey of English skills, shows a decline in English proficiency worldwide. English is recognized as the primary language in business, science, and technology, impacting over 1.
news.headline: EF study shows global decline in English proficiency, impacting offshore hiring strategy. English skills down for 4 years.

Following the press release, there will be a conference call and live webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET, open to the public. news.headline: Alpha and Omega Semiconductor will announce Q3 financial results on May 7, 2025, after market close. Conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: In Miami, Ontrak, Inc. (NASDAQ: OTRK), a top AI-powered behavioral healthcare company, disclosed financial data for Q4 and the year ending December 31, 2024. CEO Brandon LaVerne of Ontrak Health expressed satisfaction with acquiring new clients, enhancing current partnerships, and advancing their pipeline. The introduction of the WholeHealth+ solution was highlighted as a significant milestone.
news.headline: Ontrak Health reports 2024 financial results with CEO highlighting growth in new customers and pipeline expansion.

news.summary: In Melville, NY, Intellicheck, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDN) has appointed Tim Poulin as the new Senior Vice President of Sales, effective April 14, 2025. Poulin takes over from Chris Meyer in this crucial role at the industry-leading identity company known for its digital and physical identity validation technology solutions. Meyer will facilitate a seamless transition before his departure. The change aims to further enhance Intellicheck's sales strategies and strengthen its market presence.
news.headline: Intellicheck, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDN) appoints Tim Poulin as Senior VP of Sales, replacing Chris Meyer, effective April 14, 2025.

news.summary: There has been a setback in controlling inflation as the Federal Reserve's predictions for economic growth in 2025 have diminished. Furthermore, fewer central bank officials believe they can boost the economy by implementing two additional interest rate reductions this year.
news.headline: Fed unsure of future as inflation progress stalls. Growth expectations for 2025 fading, fewer policymakers predict 2 interest rate cuts.

news.summary: Skillsoft Corp. (NYSE: SKIL) revealed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year concluding on January 31, 2025. The organization reported that total revenue for the fourth quarter of the fiscal year 2025 amounted to $134 million, a slight decrease from $138 million in the previous year. Moving forward, Skillsoft also shared its financial forecast for the entire fiscal year 2026.
news.headline: Skillsoft (NYSE: SKIL) reported Q4 revenue of $134M, down from $138M last year, and provided financial outlook for FY 2026.

news.summary: The Trump administration has granted exemptions to tens of millions of businesses from an anti-money laundering law enacted during President Donald Trump's initial term. This law aimed to target anonymous shell companies aiding in financial crimes.
news.headline: Trump admin exempts many companies from anti-money-laundering law targeting shell companies.

news.summary: U.S. stock futures were lower on Thursday following a tariff pause after a stellar recovery; futures of major benchmark indices down in premarket. President Trump credited the pause to 75 non-retaliating nations in a Truth Social post. Markets await the Consumer Price Index data, with economists forecasting a 2.6% annual increase in overall CPI for March 2025, lower than February's 2.8%. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.29%, two-year bond at 3.85%. FedWatch tool shows markets pricing a 79.8% likelihood of Fed keeping rates unchanged in May. Futures Change: Dow Jones -1.73%, S&P 500 -2.23%, Nasdaq 100 -2.55%, Russell 2000 -2.92%. S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were lower in premarket. On the prior day, due to tariff pause, U.S. stocks surged, with S&P 500's largest single-day gain since 2008. Notable movers included Apple (up 15%), Nvidia (surged 19%), and Tesla (leaped 22%). Mortgage applications saw a 20% weekly increase. Dow Jones surged 7.87%, S&P 500 soared 9.52%, Nasdaq Composite jumped 12.16%, and Russell 2000 leaped 8.66%.
news.headline: US stocks set to open lower, following a 5%+ gain; Futures down. Analysts predict 2.6% annual increase in CPI for March 2025.Indices performance: Nasdaq +12.16%, S&P 500 +9.52%, Dow Jones +7.87%, Russell 2000 +8.66%.

news.summary: The House Financial Services Committee is becoming a focal point for Republican aspirations, potentially serving as a pivotal moment for the GOP's slim House majority.
news.headline: GOP members aim for House Financial Services Committee seats, boosting political ambitions and potentially impacting the GOP's slim majority.

news.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) shared that they are set to unveil their first-quarter results for 2025 on Monday, May 5, following the closure of U.S. markets. The company will conduct a webcast at 3:00 PM MT / 5:00 PM ET to delve into the outcomes. Interested parties can access a live webcast and replay at investors.palantir.com, with the option to pre-register. Moreover, shareholders can engage by submitting and voting on questions via https://app.saytechn.
news.headline: Palantir (PLTR) Q1 2025 earnings to be released on May 5, 2025, webcast at 3:00 PM MT/5:00 PM ET.Visit investors.palantir.com for more info.

news.summary: In March, inflation eased more than anticipated, with the annual rate dropping to 2.4%, the lowest level in six months, down from February's 2.8%. The Consumer Price Index declined by 0.1% monthly, contrasting with the 0.2% increase in the prior month and below the expected 0.1% rise. Gasoline prices fell by 6.3%, offset by rises in electricity and natural gas indexes. The food index increased by 0.4%. This data follows President Trump's 90-day tariff pause, boosting investor confidence. These figures surprised economists, who had anticipated a 2.6% annual rate.
news.headline: March inflation rate falls to 2.4%, below expected 2.6%, offering hope for Fed rate cuts amid easing price pressures.

news.summary: Today marks the release of the latest inflation figures, which are expected to show a significant increase. In addition, the trade tensions initiated by the current administration, often referred to as "Trump 2.0 trade war," are escalating rapidly. This indicates that the situation is poised to intensify further in the near future.
news.headline: Inflation rising amid trade tensions: Trump's new tariffs spark concerns for economy. #Stagflation looms.

news.summary: Concerns over President Donald Trump's trade wars have taken center stage in the market, leading to a significant drop in stocks on Thursday. Investors are worried that the implementation of his new tariff policies will restrict economic growth.
news.headline: Trump's trade wars cause stocks to plummet over fears of economic impact from new tariff regime.

news.summary: Cloudflare, Inc. will release its financial results for Q1 2025 on May 8, 2025, after the U.S. market closes. An investor conference call will be held the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific time (5:00 p.m. Eastern time) to discuss the results. Those interested can join by dialing (646) 968-2727 or toll-free at (888) 596-4244. Cloudflare is the leading connectivity cloud company, listed on NYSE as NET.
news.headline: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, after US market close. Investor call at 2 PM Pacific time.

news.summary: High-ranking figures in the financial industry on Wall Street are expressing resistance towards President Donald Trump's trade policies concerning tariffs. Despite their efforts to convey their concerns, they remain doubtful that their message is effectively resonating.
news.headline: Stock market affected by trade war; Wall Street leaders oppose Trump's tariffs but struggle to change his mind.

news.summary: By June 1, the regulatory body will make a decision on the staking proposal, either approving or rejecting it, or initiating further proceedings on the issue.
news.headline: SEC defers decision on Staking Proposal for Grayscale Ethereum ETFs. Verdict expected by June 1.

news.summary: Cheryl D. Alston, the Executive Director of the Employees’ Retirement Fund of the City of Dallas (ERF), has revealed her departure after serving for 20 years. Alston cited a desire to explore various opportunities in the business and non-profit sectors as the reason for leaving. She expressed intentions to maintain engagement in corporate boards and public service. Under her leadership, the ERF witnessed stable and innovative guidance.
news.headline: Cheryl D. Alston leaving Employees’ Retirement Fund of the City of Dallas after 20 years; plans to explore new opportunities.
